title: senecio polychotomus
intro: Senecio polychotomus, also known as the many-headed fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Senecio polychotomus include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reduced inflammation and improved digestion. Senecio polychotomus is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to its potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
